functional_audit.check: resolveBehavioralFingerprint(pressure_response, non_followthrough_reason) returns semicolon-joined fingerprint text from slug-keyed label maps (bTICV/bTICa custom event parity)
calculateUserBehavioralFingerprint(userId) loads behavioralPatterns from profiles.onboarding_data, computes fingerprint, patches behavioral_fingerprint_text (bTIDk/bTIDv ChangeThing parity)
runOnboardingProfilePipeline invokes calculateUserBehavioralFingerprint after calculateUserPressureProfile and before calculateUserAiCoachingMode (bTHrk ScheduleAPIEvent chain position)
evidence: cursor-impl-cycle/output/decompose/MOD-DRSAM-API.json — API-03 AC-3 (bTHqE) then API-04 AC-3 (bTHrk) then API-05 AC-3 (bTHuG)

critiques.finding: AC-1 requires fingerprint label strings to match bTICa return value bTICg from IR condition branches; PRESSURE_LABELS/FOLLOWTHROUGH_LABELS exist only in buildBehavioralFingerprint.ts and could not be independently cross-checked against drsam-99657.bubble /api/bTICa workflow return expressions.
critiques.alternative: Extract bTICa TerminateWorkflow branch return literals from drsam-99657.bubble and add a small unit test matrix (5×5 slug pairs) asserting exact bTICg strings, or centralize labels in an ENUM module traceable to Bubble option-set display metadata.

critiques.finding: Coverage preflight declares reuse_decision "new" with only OnboardingBehavioral.tsx listed, but behavioral capture UI already existed; actual work added lib calculators and extended onboardingProfilePipeline — gap-fill/extend, not greenfield.
critiques.alternative: Set reuse_decision to "gap-fill" and map cycle.json target_files from frontend/src/api/userProfile/* to frontend/src/lib/userProfile/*.

critiques.finding: Bubble bTIDv ChangeThing targets user.behavioral_fingerprint_text; prototype patches profiles.onboarding_data.behavioral_fingerprint_text via patchOnboardingAndResults (same JSONB contract as API-01/API-03). Downstream calculateUserAiCoachingMode reads onboarding_data — pipeline is internally consistent but diverges from Bubble flat user-field storage.
critiques.alternative: Document JSONB key contract in calculateUserBehavioralFingerprint.ts or add typed profile columns when project/supabase adopts flat user fields.

critiques.finding: No unit tests cover resolveBehavioralFingerprint slug→label mapping, empty/unknown slug fallbacks, or calculateUserBehavioralFingerprint read/patch path.
critiques.alternative: Add focused tests for buildBehavioralFingerprint label matrix and calculator integration with mocked loadProfileRow/patchOnboardingAndResults.
